---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# mdscrna

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

The goal of mdscrna is to store convenience packages I use in my scRNAseq 
analyses in a way that I can easily manage across analyses, make available to 
collaborators, and to make it available for use in published analyses.

## Installation

You can install the development version of mdscrna from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

```{r install}
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("mtthwsmth/mdscrna")
```
